conjecture_statement: Let $H \\in \\operatorname{Mat}_{21, 29}(\\mathbb{F}_2)$ be the canonical parity-check matrix for the code `cwcode_29_8_5` with $\\operatorname{rank}(H)=21$. Let $C = \\ker(H) \\subseteq \\mathbb{F}_2^{29}$ be the code defined by $H$. Let $G \\in \\operatorname{Mat}_{8, 29}(\\mathbb{F}_2)$ be the corresponding canonical generator matrix. Then the row space of $G$ is precisely $C$, and the minimum Hamming distance of $C$ is exactly 5. Formally, $\\operatorname{span}(\\{\\text{rows of } G\\}) = C$ and $d(C) = 5$.
lean4_sketch:
import Mathlib.LinearAlgebra.Matrix.Rank
import Mathlib.LinearAlgebra.Span
import Mathlib.LinearAlgebra.Dual
import Mathlib.Data.Matrix.Basic
import Mathlib.Data.Fintype.Card
import Mathlib.Data.ZMod.Basic
import Mathlib.Tactic.Omega

open Submodule Matrix LinearMap

-- Define Hamming weight
noncomputable def hammingWeight {n : ℕ} (v : Fin n → ZMod 2) : ℕ :=
  Fintype.card { i | v i ≠ 0 }

-- Postulate the existence of a specific parity-check matrix H.\axiom H_cwcode_29_8_5 : Matrix (Fin 21) (Fin 29) (ZMod 2)

-- Postulate H has full rank.
axiom H_cwcode_29_8_5_rank : Matrix.rank H_cwcode_29_8_5 = 21

-- The code C is defined as the kernel of the linear map represented by H.
def C_cwcode_29_8_5 : Submodule (ZMod 2) (Fin 29 → ZMod 2) :=
  ker (toLin' H_cwcode_29_8_5)

-- Postulate the existence of a specific generator matrix G.
axiom G_cwcode_29_8_5 : Matrix (Fin 8) (Fin 29) (ZMod 2)

-- Postulate G has full rank.
axiom G_cwcode_29_8_5_rank : Matrix.rank G_cwcode_29_8_5 = 8

-- The main theorem asserting the code's properties.
theorem cwcode_29_8_5 : 
  let C := C_cwcode_29_8_5
  let C_gen := span (ZMod 2) (Set.range G_cwcode_29_8_5)
  (C_gen = C) ∧ ((∀ c ∈ C, c ≠ 0 → hammingWeight c ≥ 5) ∧ (∃ c ∈ C, c ≠ 0 ∧ hammingWeight c = 5)) := by
  let C := C_cwcode_29_8_5
  let C_gen := span (ZMod 2) (Set.range G_cwcode_29_8_5)
  constructor
  · -- Sub-Lemma 2: Verify the generator matrix spans the code
    have h_span : C_gen = C := by
      have h_ortho : G_cwcode_29_8_5 * (H_cwcode_29_8_5)ᵀ = 0 := by
        sorry -- Proof requires concrete matrices; shows C_gen ⊆ C
      have h_dim_match : FiniteDimensional.finrank (ZMod 2) C_gen = FiniteDimensional.finrank (ZMod 2) C := by
        have dim_C_gen : FiniteDimensional.finrank (ZMod 2) C_gen := by rw [finrank_span_range_eq_rank, G_cwcode_29_8_5_rank]
        have dim_C : FiniteDimensional.finrank (ZMod 2) C = 8 := by
          have := finrank_range_add_finrank_ker (toLin' H_cwcode_2
lean4_sketch_archimedes:
import Mathlib.LinearAlgebra.Matrix.Rank
import Mathlib.LinearAlgebra.Span
import Mathlib.LinearAlgebra.Dual
import Mathlib.Data.Matrix.Basic
import Mathlib.Data.Fintype.Card
import Mathlib.Data.ZMod.Basic
import Mathlib.Tactic.Omega
import Mathlib.LinearAlgebra.FiniteDimensional

open Submodule Matrix LinearMap

-- Define Hamming weight
noncomputable def hammingWeight {n : ℕ} (v : Fin n → ZMod 2) : ℕ :=
  Fintype.card { i | v i ≠ 0 }

-- Postulate the existence of a specific parity-check matrix H.
axiom H_cwcode_29_8_5 : Matrix (Fin 21) (Fin 29) (ZMod 2)

-- Postulate H has full rank.
axiom H_cwcode_29_8_5_rank : Matrix.rank H_cwcode_29_8_5 = 21

-- The code C is defined as the kernel of the linear map represented by H.
def C_cwcode_29_8_5 : Submodule (ZMod 2) (Fin 29 → ZMod 2) :=
  ker (toLin' H_cwcode_29_8_5)

-- Postulate the existence of a specific generator matrix G.
axiom G_cwcode_29_8_5 : Matrix (Fin 8) (Fin 29) (ZMod 2)

-- Postulate G has full rank.
axiom G_cwcode_29_8_5_rank : Matrix.rank G_cwcode_29_8_5 = 8

-- Postulate orthogonality of G and H
axiom G_H_ortho_cwcode_29_8_5 : G_cwcode_29_8_5 * (H_cwcode_29_8_5)ᵀ = 0

-- Postulate properties of H that determine the minimum distance of the code.
axiom cwcode_29_8_5_min_dist_prop :
  (∀ (s : Finset (Fin 29)), s.card ≠ 0 ∧ s.card < 5 →
    LinearIndependent (ZMod 2) (fun i : s => (fun j => H_cwcode_29_8_5 j i))) ∧
  (∃ (S : Finset (Fin 29)), S.card = 5 ∧
    (Finset.sum S (fun j => (fun i => H_cwcode_29_8_5 i j))) = 0)

-- The main theorem asserting the code's properties.
theorem cwcode_29_8_5 :
  let C := C_cwcode_29_8_5
  let C_gen := span (ZMod 2) (Set.range G_cwcode_29_8_5)
  (C_gen = C) ∧ ((∀ c ∈ C, c ≠ 0 → hammingWeight c ≥ 5) ∧ (∃ c ∈ C, c ≠ 0 ∧ hammingWeight c = 5)) := by
  let C := C_cwcode_29_8_5
  let C_gen := span (ZMod 2) (Set.range G_cwcode_29_8_5)
  constructor
  · -- Sub-Lemma 2: Verify the generator matrix spans the code
    have h_span : C_gen = C := by
      have h_le : C_gen ≤ C := by
        rw [span_le]
        intro v hv
        rw [Set.mem_range] at hv
        obtain ⟨i, rfl⟩ := hv
        rw [mem_ker, toLin'_apply]
        ext k
        simp only [mulVec, dotProduct, Fin.sum_univ_eq_sum_range, Pi.zero_apply]
        have h_entry : (G_cwcode_29_8_5 * H_cwcode_29_8_5ᵀ) i k = 0 := by
          rw [G_H_ortho_cwcode_29_8_5]
          rfl
        rw [Matrix.mul_apply] at h_entry
        exact h_entry
      have h_dim_match : FiniteDimensional.finrank (ZMod 2) C_gen = FiniteDimensional.finrank (ZMod 2) C := by
        have dim_C_gen : FiniteDimensional.finrank (ZMod 2) C_gen = 8 := by
          rw [finrank_span_range_eq_rank G_cwcode_29_8_5, G_cwcode_29_8_5_rank]
        have dim_C : FiniteDimensional.finrank (ZMod 2) C = 8 := by
          let T := toLin' H_cwcode_29_8_5
          have h_rank_nullity := finrank_range_add_finrank_ker T
          rw [finrank_ker, rank_eq_finrank_range, H_cwcode_29_8_5_rank] at h_rank_nullity
          rw [finrank_pi, Fintype.card_fin, finrank_zmod_self] at h_rank_nullity
          simp only at h_rank_nullity
          omega
        rw [dim_C_gen, dim_C]
      exact Submodule.eq_of_le_of_finrank_eq h_le h_dim_match
    exact h_span
  · constructor
    · -- Sub-Lemma 3: Minimum distance is at least 5
      intro c hc hc_ne_zero
      by_contra h_lt_5
      let S := {i | c i ≠ 0}.toFinset
      have h_card_S : S.card = hammingWeight c := by simp
      have h_card_S_lt_5 : S.card < 5 := by omega
      have h_card_S_ne_0 : S.card ≠ 0 := by
        intro h_zero
        rw [Finset.card_eq_zero] at h_zero
        apply hc_ne_zero
        ext i
        by_contra ci_ne_0
        have i_in_S : i ∈ S := by simp [ci_ne_0]
        rw [h_zero] at i_in_S
        simp at i_in_S

      have h_sum_cols_zero : Finset.sum S (fun j => (fun i => H_cwcode_29_8_5 i j)) = 0 := by
        ext i
        simp only [Pi.zero_apply, Finset.sum_apply]
        have Hc_i : (H_cwcode_29_8_5 *ᵥ c) i = 0 := by
          rw [← toLin'_apply]
          exact congr_fun (mem_ker.mp hc) i
        simp only [mulVec, dotProduct] at Hc_i
        rw [← Finset.sum_subset S.subset_univ (fun j _ h => by simp [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Finset.mem_coe, Finset.mem_univ] at h; rw [h, mul_zero])] at Hc_i
        convert Hc_i
        apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
        intro j hj
        have cj_eq_1 : c j = 1 := by
          rcases ZMod.val_eq_zero_or_one (c j) with h | h
          · exfalso; simpa [h] using hj
          · exact h
        rw [cj_eq_1, mul_one]

      let cols := fun j => (fun i => H_cwcode_29_8_5 i j)
      have h_li := cwcode_29_8_5_min_dist_prop.1 S ⟨h_card_S_ne_0, h_card_S_lt_5⟩
      rw [linearIndependent_iff] at h_li
      specialize h_li (fun _ => 1)
      have h_sum_rewritten : (Finset.sum S.attach fun j => 1 • cols j) = 0 := by
        simp [h_sum_cols_zero]
      specialize h_li h_sum_rewritten
      have S_nonempty : S.Nonempty := Finset.card_pos.mp (by omega)
      have h_contra := h_li (S_nonempty.to_subtype)
      simp at h_contra

    · -- Sub-Lemma 4: A codeword of weight 5 exists
      rcases cwcode_29_8_5_min_dist_prop.2 with ⟨S, h_card_S, h_sum_S_zero⟩
      let c : Fin 29 → ZMod 2 := fun i => if i ∈ S then 1 else 0
      use c
      refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
      · -- Prove c ∈ C
        rw [mem_ker, toLin'_apply]
        ext i
        simp only [mulVec, dotProduct, Pi.zero_apply]
        have h_sum_c : (∑ j : Fin 29, H_cwcode_29_8_5 i j * c j) = (∑ j in S, H_cwcode_29_8_5 i j) := by
          apply (Finset.sum_subset S.subset_univ _).symm
          · intro j _ hj_notin_S
            rw [if_neg hj_notin_S, mul_zero]
          · intro j hj_in_S _
            rw [if_pos hj_in_S, mul_one]
        rw [h_sum_c]
        exact congr_fun h_sum_S_zero i
      · refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
        · -- Prove c ≠ 0
          intro c_is_zero
          have S_nonempty : S.Nonempty := by
            rw [h_card_S]
            norm_num
          rcases S_nonempty with ⟨j, hj⟩
          have cj_is_1 : c j = 1 := by simp [hj]
          have cj_is_0 : c j = 0 := by rw [c_is_zero]; rfl
          rw [cj_is_1] at cj_is_0
          norm_num at cj_is_0
        · -- Prove hammingWeight c = 5
          unfold hammingWeight
          have h_support : { i | c i ≠ 0 } = S := by
            ext i
            simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Finset.mem_coe, ite_ne_zero_iff, one_ne_zero, and_true]
          rw [h_support, Fintype.card_coe, h_card_S]
